name: project-mrn-redis-runtime

required_roles.name: server
required_roles.restart_recovery_policy: keep only after target topology passes redis_restart_smoke.py; otherwise abort_in_progress

shared_environment.MRN_REDIS_URL: same private Redis endpoint for every role
shared_environment.MRN_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX: single stable Redis Cluster hash-tagged prefix, for example mrn:{project-mrn-prod}
shared_environment.MRN_GAME_LOG_ARCHIVE_PATH: shared durable archive path if game logs must survive replacement

invariants: server, prompt-timeout-worker, and command-wakeup-worker must run together for Redis-backed live sessions
all roles must report the same Redis hash tag before routing live sessions
worker readiness commands must exit 0 before the deployment is considered ready
accepted human decisions must wake the command worker and advance to waiting_input, finished, or unavailable
runtime stream replay must not shrink across process restart
